svg.text: COOKIE CONSENT & GDPR COMPLIANCE - Modal Flow

g.text: We use cookies to enhance your experience.
As a first-time visitor, I need to be informed about cookie
usage and make a choice before any non-essential cookies
are set so that my privacy preferences are respected.
✓ Consent modal appears before any tracking occurs
As a privacy-conscious user, I need to control exactly which
types of cookies are used so that I can allow functional
✓ Four distinct categories with individual toggles
As a returning user, I need my cookie preferences to be
remembered so that I don't have to re-configure them
As a user who changed my mind about tracking, I need to
access and modify my cookie preferences at any time so
that I maintain control over my privacy.
✓ Privacy settings accessible from footer link
As a user exercising my GDPR rights, I need to export all
data the application has stored about me so that I can
see exactly what information has been collected.
As a user exercising my GDPR rights, I need to request
deletion of my data so that I can exercise my "right to
✓ All locally stored data is removed on confirmation
Display consent modal on first visit before non-essential cookies set
Accept All, Reject All, and Manage Preferences options
Four cookie categories: Necessary, Functional, Analytics, Marketing
Consent modal appears within 500ms of first page load
100% of non-essential cookies blocked until explicit consent
Consent system passes WCAG AA accessibility audit
